title: Nicola Spring Coir Door Mat - 60 x 40cm - Classic - Decorative Indoor Front Door Floor Mat Entry Dirt Trapper Rug Outdoor Boot Scraper Non Slip Backing Doormat
features: Durable Coir Construction – Made from natural coir coconut fibres, these doormats offer exceptional strength and durability, effectively brushing away dirt, mud, and dust from your shoes while adding a natural, rustic charm to your entryway.

Non-Slip PVC Backing – Featuring a black PVC backing, these mats trap moisture and water to protect your interior carpets while preventing slippage. Enjoy a safe and clean doorway every time you step inside.

Versatile Sizes for Any Space – Available in two sizes—40 x 60cm and 60 x 90cm—these mats are ideal for various doorways, fitting perfectly in both residential and professional spaces. Choose the perfect size for your home or office entrance.

Easy to Clean – Cleaning is a breeze: simply hang the mat outside and beat away dirt with a broom handle, then brush through with water. Lay flat to dry, and your mat will be fresh and ready for use again in no time.

Perfect for Indoor & Outdoor Use – Designed for both indoor and outdoor spaces, these mats withstand the elements while adding an inviting touch to any home. Their versatility makes them perfect for use on porches, entryways, or even in offices.
description: Product Description Add a touch of porch-side personality to your home and keep interior floors and carpets clean with our Nicola Spring Door and Welcome Mats. High Fibre Diet Crafted from coconut fibres, our Coir Door Mats possess a natural strength and durability perfectly suited to scrubbing dirt, dust and grime from the soles of your shoes. A selection of striking designs and decorations lets you perfectly show off your style to guests and passers-by, while the robust PVC backing ensures non-slip suitability to all seasons. When the Going Gets Tough Our Polypropylene and Rubber Door Mats provide a sleek, low-profile finish, perfect for offices and more formal locations. A series of subtle, narrow ridges and channels offer an efficient scrubbing solution that is also easy to clean. Because we appreciate that every doorway is different, our collection includes door mats in a variety of shapes and sizes designed to perfectly cater to your needs.
